title: hieracium cordatum subsp. conaticum
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. conaticum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is a type of hawkweed with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help reduce swelling, soothe wounds, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The medicinal properties of Hieracium cordatum subsp. conaticum can be utilized through herbal preparations like infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other substances.
